items.title: 'No dead ends': What the Dutch can teach us about tackling youth unemployment
items.dek: The Netherlands has one of the world's lowest rates of 16 to 24-year-olds not in education, employment or training.
items.body: The Netherlands has one of the world's lowest rates of 16 to 24-year-olds not in education, employment or training.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Spain's visitor numbers hit new highs as tourists avoid Middle East
items.dek: The European country had 9.1 million international visitors in April, the most ever for that month.
items.body: The European country had 9.1 million international visitors in April, the most ever for that month.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'A World Cup for them not us': Fans' anger at US travel bans and visa restrictions
items.dek: Fans across the world say US travel bans and visa regulations make them feel excluded from the World Cup.
items.body: Fans across the world say US travel bans and visa regulations make them feel excluded from the World Cup.
items.author: IriLine Desk
